__fixture__.name: protected_walk_verified_publisher_approve
__fixture__.scenario: Protected walk for the bounded typed-permission-prompt wedge on the install-review path. A verified-publisher row with a complete manifest, two declared permissions (filesystem_read on workspace docs and ai_provider_access through the user's connected provider), and a clean install-review fact-grid card. The shell renders a typed permission prompt that names the requester, the issuer, the scope, the consequence, the deny path, and a workspace-scope persistence label. The user approves; the wedge transitions to a clean approved decision state with no invariant violations and a summary line ending `approved`.

requester.request_origin_label: Extension install/review wedge initiated by user on extensions surface.

scope_target_label: Current workspace root (docs/) for read-only manifest scope.
grant_persistence_label: Workspace — grant remembered for this workspace until revoked.

denial_branch.deny_path_label: Local editing and read-only inspection of the manifest continue; extension is not enabled.

prompt_questions.who_is_asking: The Acme Labs Prose Helper extension manifest is asking for filesystem-read and AI-provider access.
prompt_questions.what_boundary: Workspace docs/ filesystem read plus AI-provider access via the user's connected provider.
prompt_questions.why_needed: The extension reads prose documents and asks the user's AI provider for grammar suggestions.
prompt_questions.what_changes_if_allowed: The extension activates and gains workspace-scoped read access plus AI-provider use under the user's existing provider link.
prompt_questions.what_works_if_denied: Local editing, manifest inspection, and read-only extension metadata remain available.
prompt_questions.grant_persistence_statement: Workspace grant — remembered for this workspace only until revoked from Settings.

declared_permissions.rationale_label: Read prose documents for grammar suggestions.
Use the user's AI provider to refine suggestions.

install_decision.decision_summary: Admitted: complete manifest, attributed publisher, no widening attempt.
